title: Companion Interchange v1
description: Game-relevant projection of a companion_ai_core CompleteCompanionEntity for design-time baking into game templates (Pandora entities, Dialogue Manager personas, portrait asset-plans). POINT-IN-TIME MAPPING: companion_ai_core is under active development; this schema was last mapped 2026-07-11 against localllm_poc@1eb530af. On breaking library changes: re-explore the entity structure (read-only), bump interchangeVersion, and route unmapped data through the `extensions` passthrough. See schema/FIELD_MAPPINGS.md for the exact Dart-entity-to-interchange mapping.

interchangeVersion.description: Schema version. Bumped on breaking changes to the projection; additive optional fields inside groups do NOT bump this.

relationships.description: Typed links to other entities (NPCs, factions, the player). From entity.relationshipData (Map<entityId, type>), entity.socialNetwork (Dunbar layers), entity.relationships (RelationshipSystem: user bond).

extensions.description: Lossless passthrough valve. Anything not covered by the v1 projection goes here unmodified — including the full CompleteCompanionEntity.toJson() dump under extensions.fullEntity if desired. Importers MUST preserve this object verbatim into companion.json and MUST ignore unknown keys. This is the forward-compat mechanism while companion_ai_core evolves.

age.description: From demographicProfile.age (flat entity.age is deprecated but still emitted by toJson).

hofstede.description: Hofstede 6D scores 0-100 from entity toJson 'hofstedeDimensions' (flat field or derived from culturalProfile.advancedCulturalDynamics.hofstede).

archetype.description: Jungian archetype from entity.archetype (CompanionArchetype enum, companion_types.dart).

bigFive.description: FFM trait scores 0.0-1.0. From personalityProfile.bigFive (BigFiveTraits) / flat bigFiveTraits.

hexaco.description: Optional HEXACO scores 0.0-1.0 where available (honestyHumility, emotionality, extraversion, agreeableness, conscientiousness, openness).

attachmentStyle.description: From psychologicalProfile.attachmentStyle / flat attachmentStyle (secure, anxious, avoidant, fearful-avoidant).

quirks.description: Top behavioral quirks/mannerisms as human-readable strings. From entity.mannerisms (the entity's `quirks` getter aliases mannerisms; source pools in lib/src/data/quirks/comprehensive_quirks_data.dart). Keep to the top ~8 game-relevant ones.

behaviorTendencies.description: Named tendency scores 0-1 (nurturing, curious, cautious, ...). From entity.behaviorTendencies.

moralFoundations.description: Haidt moral foundations scores. From flat entity.moralFoundations.

appearance.description: Structured physical summary projected from physicalProfile (ComprehensivePhysicalCharacteristics, lib/src/domain/physical/comprehensive_physical_characteristics.dart — 300+ attributes; we keep the portrait-relevant surface).

hairStyle.description: Stage-2 field or hair characteristics summary

distinguishingFeatures.description: Freckles, scars, glasses, tattoos, etc. From asymmetries / bodyModifications / Stage-2 descriptions.

typicalOutfit.description: One-line wardrobe summary from fashionStyleProfile / fullWardrobe.

portraitPrompt.description: Pre-composed portrait prompt string. MUST contain the literal token {style} where the template's style anchor is injected (style-anchor skill). The importer regenerates a prompt if absent.

voice.description: Voice hints for TTS/VoiceDesign and dialogue speech-style authoring. From entity.voiceProfile (Map generated by Stage1InstantGenerator._generateVoiceProfile: pitch_range, pitch (Hz), voice_quality, accent, speech_pattern, volume, pace, tempo, tone, timbre, breathiness, nasality, roughness, strain, resonance) plus entity.speechPatterns / linguisticPatterns.

pitch.description: Bucketed from voiceProfile.pitch (Hz): female F0 ~217.5 avg, male ~132.5 (Titze 1994).

speechStyle.description: voiceProfile.speech_pattern + voice_quality merged ('varied and expressive, clear and confident').

styleTags.description: Freeform descriptors for VoiceDesign-style prompt TTS (e.g. 'smiling', 'raspy edge', 'code-switches into Portuguese when excited').

values.description: Named value weights (family: 0.9, tradition: 0.7, ...). From personalityProfile.values / flat entity.values / culturalValues.

skills.description: Top-N skills. From entity.skillProficiencies (Map<name, CompanionSkillProficiency{name, source, proficiency, practiceHours}>), fallback flat entity.skills list.

interests.description: Interest → intensity 0-1. From entity.interestIntensityProfile (0.5 genuine, 0.7 enthusiast, 0.9 obsessive).

backstorySummary.description: Condensed 1-3 paragraph version of entity.backstory (full narrative can ride in extensions).

secrets.description: From entity.secrets (complexity-scaled Map: simple 1-2 minor, legendary 5-7 life-defining).

target.description: Target id or name ('player', another companion's identity.id, or a named NPC).

type.description: Relationship type: friend, rival, sibling, parent, mentor, ex-partner, regular-customer, ... From relationshipData values / socialNetwork layer names.

closeness.description: 0-1; from socialNetwork entry closeness or bondLevel/10 for the user link.

emotionalBaseline.description: Resting emotional disposition from entity.emotionalState (EmotionalState, lib/src/domain/emotions/emotional_state.dart — Russell circumplex) and emotionalSystems.moodBaseline.

dominantEmotions.description: Top resting emotions with intensity (from EmotionalState.emotions Map<EmotionCategory, double>).

source.description: Producing system, e.g. 'companion_ai_core'. Hand-authored fixtures use 'handcrafted'.

sourceCommit.description: Git commit of the source library at export time (companion_ai_core moves fast — record it).

contentRating.description: Game-side projections default to sfw; intimacy-system attribute groups are never projected into v1 fields (extensions only, and only when rating is 'mature').
